name: Shiro Kitsuki
text: Reaction: After a conflict is declared, name a card – after each time your opponent plays that card during this conflict, choose an unclaimed ring and claim it as a [pol] ring, gaining all fate from it. (Unlimited.)

name: Henshin Mysteries
text: Interrupt: During a conflict at this province, if a player would claim the contest ring – return it to the unclaimed ring pool instead.

name: Smuggler's Cove
text:
Seeker role only.
During a conflict at this province, choose a character you control and select one – either move that character to the conflict or move it home.

name: Frontline Engineer
text:
This character gets +1 glory for each holding in play.
Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending – search the top 5 cards of your dynasty deck for a holding and put it into play in the attacked province, discarding each other card in that province. Shuffle.

name: Strategic Weakpoint
text: Interrupt: When this holding's province is broken, your opponent chooses an attacking character – discard that character.

name: Court Musician
text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating – during each player's next action opportunity in this conflict, decrease the cost to play cards by 1.

name: Daidoji Kageyu
text:
Disguised Courtier.
Action: During a [pol] conflict in which this character is participating – draw 1 card for each card your opponent has played in this conflict.

name: Army of the Rising Wave
text:
No attachment except Weapon.
Reaction: After this character enters play – place 1 fate on each unclaimed ring.

name: Quarrelsome Youth
text: Reaction: After this character loses a conflict as an attacker, if you have fewer cards in your hand than your opponent – your opponent discards 1 random card from his or her hand.

name: Unified Company
text:
No attachments except Weapon.
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, if you have fewer cards in your hand than your opponent – put a non-unique Bushi character with printed cost 2 or less into play from your dynasty discard pile.

name: Asako Takahiro
text:
Pride.
During a conflict in which this character is participating, it gains +2 [mil] for each other participating dishonored character and +2 [pol] for each other participating honored character.

name: Palace Guard
text: This character cannot be declared as an attacker against a less honorable player than you.

name: Petal Village Estate
text: Each Imperial character you control gets +1[mil] and +1[pol].

name: Keeper of Secret Names
text: Action: During a conflict, choose an unbroken province – resolve that province's action ability as if the conflict were at that province.

name: Withstand the Darkness
text: Reaction: After an opponent plays an event that chooses a  character you control as a target – place 1 fate on that character. (Max 1 per phase.)

name: Shukujo
text:
Attach to a unique  character you control. Ancestral. Restricted.
If attached character has the Champion trait, it gains "Action: during a conflict in which this character is participating – switch the conflict type."

name: Deduction
text: Action: During a [pol] conflict, return a ring from your claimed ring pool to the unclaimed ring pool. Choose a participating character with printed cost 3 or lower – bow that character.

name: Fan of Command
text: Action: During a conflict in which attached character is participating, choose a participating Bushi character – ready that character.

name: Erudite Prestige
text:
Attach to a Courtier character.
Reaction: After you play a card during a conflict – attached character gets +1 [pol] until the end of the conflict. (Unlimited.)

name: By Any Means
text: Action: During a conflict, if your honor bid is higher than your opponent's, choose a participating Bushi character you control and a participating character your opponent controls – until the end of the conflict, set your character's base [mil] skill to the current [mil] skill of your opponent's character.

name: Current of the Beryt
text:
Attach to a Shugenja character.
Action: During a conflict – take two actions.

name: Outflank
text: Reaction: After an opponent's province is revealed during a conflict, choose a non-unique character – that character cannot be declared as a defender in this conflict. (Max 1 per conflict.)
